description: A small, well-built loan-payment process: validated inputs, a dedicated calculation subsheet, a deliberate business-exception path for invalid inputs, and Recover/Resume coverage on the main page. Contains zero planted issues — any finding reported against this sample is a false positive.
notes: REL-001 exception coverage is satisfied by the main page's Recover/Resume pair: the subsheet's deliberate Exception stage propagates to the caller where it is recovered. The Exception stage itself is intentional validation behavior, not a defect.
